problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: Combining Attention mechanism with linear complexity with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Hardware prototype with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
